name: Hillary for Virginia
subject: Have some spare room for a member of Team Hillary?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1
body:
| Friend --

We're building an organization that can take on Trump in November, and that starts in Virginia right now. That means we have staffers and volunteers pouring into town to help talk to voters about Hillary -- and all those folks need a place to stay.

We're so grateful for the number of people in your area who've stepped up to host a volunteer or staff member, but we’re still looking for housing for more Hillary supporters. **[Can you lend a spare room (or couch, or futon)? It's a really critical way to help out.**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjU2MDEwMzkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODA0MjQzMjkzS0&mt=1&rt=0)

One of the key ways we’re building support for Hillary in your state is by knocking on doors and having face-to-face conversations -- and folks are coming in from all across the country to join us. Our staff and volunteers need a place to rest at the end of a jam-packed day of getting out the vote. **It will mean so much to them to stay with an awesome Team Hillary member like you:**
[](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjU2MDEwMzkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODA0MjQzMjkzS0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks,

Hillary for Virginia

| | Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1.2 million donors committed to electing Hillary Clinton (and keeping Donald Trump out of the White House).
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjU2MDEwMzkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODA0MjQzMjkzS0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjU2MDEwMzkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODA0MjQzMjkzS0&mt=1&rt=0). Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjU2MDEwMzkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODA0MjQzMjkzS0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjU2MDEwMzkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODA0MjQzMjkzS0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjU2MDEwMzkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODA0MjQzMjkzS0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjU2MDEwMzkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODA0MjQzMjkzS0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjU2MDEwMzkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODA0MjQzMjkzS0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjU2MDEwMzkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODA0MjQzMjkzS0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjU2MDEwMzkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODA0MjQzMjkzS0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjU2MDEwMzkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODA0MjQzMjkzS0&mt=1&rt=0)

body:

>

Yes, you heard me right, Citizens United -- the same group that brought us the Supreme Court decision that opened the floodgates to unlimited outside corporate money in our elections.

* "The stakes for a Democratic Senate have never been higher. It's time to fight."

-- Senator Elizabeth Warren
* "If we don't help Maggie Hassan [...] we'll lose our best -- and maybe ONLY -- opportunity to retake a Democratic Senate."

-- Senator Kirsten Gillibrand
* "Electing Maggie is vital to turning the Senate blue and [confirming] justices who will defend our Democratic values."

-- Senator Jeanne Shaheen

But the latest poll shows Maggie's race is in a dead heat, and only grassroots supporters like you can make the difference between winning and losing.
Here's the question: **[Will you join Senators Warren, Shaheen, and Gillibrand and donate $3 or more now to help Maggie win in New Hampshire and take back the Senate?](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd318/2a380d31/13cd3998/f8540e/3556975710/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYwNTI4LW5oLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20160528-nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")**
With control of the Senate and the future of the Supreme Court at stake, New Hampshire is the one seat that could be the difference between real progress and two, four, or even six more years of GOP control.
But corporate special interests have already poured nearly $10 MILLION into this race, and they're not slowing down: They just announced _another_ ad buy against her!

name: BernieSanders.com
subject: We're surging in California. Help push us over the top.
body:
#
Dear Bernie Supporter,
Thanks in no small part to your efforts on the phones last weekend, voter registration numbers in California saw a big surge right before the May 23rd deadline.
We also learned this week that - according to a poll from the Public Policy Institute of California - **we're now within striking distance of a victory in California** on June 7th.
Our in-state staff and volunteers are working incredibly hard for the win, **but they need your help.** This is the most critical weekend for us to get on the phones and identify Bernie supporters, so that next week our ground teams know which doors to knock and which voters to persuade. **Can you pitch in an hour or two of your time this weekend to help Bernie win California?**
**[Yes, I'll make some calls this weekend](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/call-california-for-bernie?source=em160528 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/call-california-for-bernie?source=em160528")**
If you'd prefer to team up with other Bernie supporters and make calls from a phonebanking party in your community, our awesome volunteer hosts would love to have you! Please RSVP below:
**[Phone banking for Bernie - Alexandria, VA:](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/event/detail/gpg4hb)
Saturday, May 28th in Alexandria **
**[Phonebank at the Obama House! (Part of DMV for Bernie!):](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/event/detail/gpgt2b)
Sunday, May 29th in Washington **
**[Phone banking for Bernie - Alexandria/Springfield, Virginia:](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/event/detail/gpgjjw)
Monday, May 30th in Fairfax **
If you've never called voters for Bernie before, don't worry - it's not hard. You just need a computer or a tablet, and a phone. We provide a simple script for you to follow, and dedicated volunteers are standing by on livechat to assist if you run into any problems.
Thanks to your support, we've won 21 primaries and caucuses so far this year - **a result that no one would have predicted when we launched this campaign just over a year ago.** California represents the biggest prize of all, with 475 pledged delegates at stake, and a victory there would send a gigantic signal to the political establishment that our movement has real staying power.
With your help, we'll keep this political revolution going all the way to the convention in Philadelphia. So we hope you can help out this weekend and [**sign up to call for an hour or two.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/call-california-for-bernie?source=em160528 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/call-california-for-bernie?source=em160528")
In solidarity,
Team Bernie

**[I can't volunteer, but I'll contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/win-california?refcode=em160528-ca-kicker "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/win-california?refcode=em160528-ca-kicker")**

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE

Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

name: Bill Cole
subject: Memorial Day
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF COLE
body:
| |
---
| Friend --

West Virginians are prideful. We are proud of our state – its beauty, its history, and its people. We are proud of our history. The strength of our state was born from our statehood. When President Abraham Lincoln signed the proclamation establishing West Virginia, he did so to help strengthen our union during the greatest civil threat to our county.
Throughout our history our people have in record numbers pledged loyalty to our union and fought to keep it strong by defending our country in battles around the world. We are proud of their service. On Memorial Day let’s join together as West Virginians and be proud of their sacrifice. Let’s learn their stories from the loved ones they left behind. Let's thank their family members for their strength to carry on and thank them for the strength and courage of their loved ones who sacrificed so much. Our state’s veterans and service members are true heroes who should be remembered every day. Today as record numbers of West Virginians struggle from the loss of lives and injuries, both physical and mental, left from the current War on Terror, I want all of them to know the tremendous pride I have in their sacrifice and service. I also want them to be assured that as Governor, I will do everything within my power to get them the services they need. Whether it be access to quality health care, education and job training, or a break on their taxes, I will fight for them just as hard as they have fought for us.

I hope each of you have a blessed Memorial Day, and ask all of you to join me in pausing to remember those who sacrificed to defend our freedoms.

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1
body:
Trump's enthusiasm for the crash | Friend --

In 2006, Donald Trump seemed pretty excited about a potential real estate market crash:

“I sort of hope that happens, because then people like me would go in and buy,” he said back then. “If there is a bubble burst, as they call it, you know, you could make a lot of money.”

Well, Trump got his wish. As a result of the financial crisis, 9 million Americans lost their jobs and 5 million families lost their homes. It was the worst economic crisis since the Great Depression. It took years for the unemployment rate to get back close to pre-recession levels -- and middle-class incomes still haven’t recovered.

And this week when he was asked about his enthusiasm for the crash, Trump doubled-down, saying that we need a president who would think like he did during the crash -- getting a “good result” out of a bad situation.

For Trump, getting a “good result” is all about his personal account balance -- and if millions of people lose their jobs, pensions, and homes, so what?

That's the kind of thinking we don't want to let anywhere near the Oval Office. We have to elect someone ready to fight for the most vulnerable among us -- not a guy focused on making sure he turns a profit off of them.

**It's going to take all of us working together to stop him. So I need you to be part of that. Chip in before our end-of-month fundraising deadline on Tuesday at midnight, and we’ll send you a free Team Hillary sticker:** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjU2MDYyODUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODA0MzQ2MjUwS0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks,

Christina

Hillary for America
